import.title: [TODO:translate] Review team capabilities
import.intro: [TODO:translate] This team declares the following capabilities. Grant only what you trust.

cap.canReadFilesDesc: [TODO:translate] Grants this team's agents read access to files within your workspace folder. The .env, .ssh, and node_modules/.bin/.cache directories are always blocked.
cap.canWriteFilesDesc: [TODO:translate] Grants write + mkdir access within your workspace. Symlinks are always blocked. Protected paths always denied.
cap.canSpawnAgentsDesc: [TODO:translate] Allows the leader to grow the roster at runtime via team_spawn_agent.
cap.canNetworkRequestDesc: [TODO:translate] Allows fetch/https.request calls from agent processes.
cap.canCrossTeamMessageDesc: [TODO:translate] Allows team_send_message to deliver to teams outside this one.
